description: A color candid photograph from a Police Week ceremony. Vice President JD Vance, in a navy suit with a dark red tie and flag lapel pin, stands in the center surrounded by uniformed law-enforcement officers in dress blues, many wearing white gloves and rendering hand salutes; campaign-hat state-trooper officers are seen in the foreground and a green outdoor lawn in the background. There is no graphic text or design overlay (OCR detected only noise), so this is a documentary event photo rather than a designed meme. It accompanies the tweet honoring 'Police and Peace Officers around America this Police Week.'
